simulation_goal_structured: Reduce the time customers wait between application submission and receiving a usable offer while increasing the proportion of applications that reach an accepted outcome, ensuring compliance checks remain complete and adding no more than one validation specialist.

kpis.name: Average Application-to-Offer Cycle Time
kpis.description: The average elapsed time from application submission to the creation of a usable offer for the customer.

smart_breakdown.specific: Measures the time from application submission to offer creation across all cases.
smart_breakdown.measurable: Computed as the average difference between the timestamps of application submission and offer creation. Unit: hours.
smart_breakdown.achievable: Cycle time reduction is feasible through process optimization and better handling of incomplete applications.
smart_breakdown.relevant: Directly supports the goal of shortening customer wait times for usable offers.
smart_breakdown.time_bound: Evaluated across all simulated cases in the run

kpis.name: Average Waiting Time Across All Activities
kpis.description: The average waiting time (queue time) across all activities in the loan origination process, reflecting how long work items sit idle before being picked up.

smart_breakdown.specific: Measures the mean idle time between activity handoffs across the entire loan origination process.
smart_breakdown.measurable: Computed as the average waiting time per completed case across all activities. Unit: hours.
smart_breakdown.achievable: Reduction is realistic through better resource scheduling and workload balancing.
smart_breakdown.relevant: Queue time is the primary driver of customer wait between application and offer; reducing it directly supports the stated goal.
smart_breakdown.time_bound: Evaluated across all simulated cases in the run

kpis.suggested_formula: AVG(waiting_time) across all activities and all completed cases

kpis.name: Validation Specialist Utilization Rate
kpis.description: The percentage of available working time that validation specialists spend actively processing applications.

smart_breakdown.specific: Measures the productive utilization of validation specialists across all validation-related activities.
smart_breakdown.measurable: Computed as SUM(active processing time) / SUM(available working time) * 100. Unit: percentage.
smart_breakdown.achievable: Utilization can be improved through workload balancing and reducing unnecessary rework.
smart_breakdown.relevant: Addresses the constraint of limited validation specialist capacity while supporting process efficiency.
smart_breakdown.time_bound: Evaluated across all simulated cases in the run

kpis.suggested_formula: SUM(active_processing_time) / SUM(available_time) * 100 over the simulation run

kpis.name: Wait Time Before Validation Activity
kpis.description: The average waiting time before the W_Validate application activity, targeting the primary validation bottleneck.

smart_breakdown.specific: Measures the queue time immediately before W_Validate application across all cases.
smart_breakdown.measurable: Computed as the average waiting time before W_Validate application per completed case. Unit: hours.
smart_breakdown.achievable: Improvement is feasible through better prioritization and scheduling of validation tasks.
smart_breakdown.relevant: W_Validate application is the longest-wait activity in the baseline; reducing its queue time directly shortens customer wait.
smart_breakdown.time_bound: Evaluated across all simulated cases in the run

kpis.suggested_formula: AVG(waiting_time('W_Validate application')) across all completed cases

kpis.name: W_Assess Potential Fraud Wait Time
kpis.description: The average waiting time before the mandatory fraud-assessment compliance step, used as a safeguard to confirm the scenario does not deprioritise this regulatory activity.

smart_breakdown.specific: Measures the queue time immediately before W_Assess potential fraud across all cases.
smart_breakdown.measurable: Computed as the average waiting time before W_Assess potential fraud per completed case. Unit: hours.
smart_breakdown.achievable: Keeping this time stable is realistic; the constraint is that it must not increase materially.
smart_breakdown.relevant: Dutch and EU consumer-credit rules require this check on every file; any increase in wait time signals the step is being de-resourced.
smart_breakdown.time_bound: Evaluated across all simulated cases in the run

kpis.suggested_formula: AVG(waiting_time('W_Assess potential fraud')) across all completed cases

reasoning: This KPI set addresses all key aspects of the simulation goal: reducing customer wait times (cycle time and average waiting time), managing resource constraints (utilization), targeting the primary validation bottleneck (W_Validate application wait time), and safeguarding the mandatory compliance step (W_Assess potential fraud wait time). All five KPIs are directly computable from Prosimos simulation output, ensuring the Stage-2 evaluation can measure directional improvement on every target.
